payload.answer: I didn’t save this as a memory because today’s weather is temporary and not durable personal information.

entity_resolution.reason: The statement is transient situational information and has no durable personal memory value.

repair_options: If you want me to remember a durable preference or routine related to weather, tell me that instead, e.g. “Remember I prefer cloudy weather.”
